Notice Of Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: David A. Kleczek, Esq. (510.663.7100) appearing for RONNDALE ESPORLAS, plaintiff / opposing party; Cheryl A. Stevens, Esq. of Santa Clara County (408.299.5934) appearing for SANTA CLARA SHERIFF'S OFFICE, other party (third party)/ moving party

RULING - A R G U E D: SHERIFF'S OFFICE'S Motion to Quash Deposition Subpoena for Production of Business Records. The Court orders respective counsel to meet and confer further. If the parties are unable to resolve the matter, counsel may contact the judge pro tem to set a hearing date. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
